productDisplayName: Fastrack Unisex Navy blue and Green Bagpack
description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this black and neon green backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super funky!Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityOne large roomy main compartment with two smaller zippered pockets for stowing essentialsMesh panels on the front for added attractionSmall pouch on the front with mesh outerSingle adjustable strap that goes across the chestPadded strap with mesh on the inner side for better breathability and comfortPouch attached to the strap for keeping the mobile phone safe, with a Velcro closureBrand tab appliqued to mobile pouch and on the sideWaist clasp to hold bag in placeHaul loop for handling easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
